steps.title: Identify the essential name
steps.content: Lithuania specifies which fellow OECD member nation is meant. Since the name is essential to identify the nation, it should not be separated from nation by punctuation.

steps.title: Remove appositive punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses a comma, Choice B uses a semicolon before a fragment, and Choice C uses a dash to set off essential information. The remaining choice keeps nation and Lithuania together. The answer is D.
